text:
DSBLTY_DFCLTY_WLKG_IND_11 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_WLKG_IND_12 

LABEL: Disability Indicator — Difficulty Walking ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to indicate whether the beneficiary is five years old or older and has serious difficulty 
walking or climbing stairs in the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during 
the year. 

SHORT NAME: DSBLTY_DFCLTY_WLKG_IND_01 
DSBLTY_DFCLTY_WLKG_IND_02 
DSBLTY_DFCLTY_WLKG_IND_03 
DSBLTY_DFCLTY_WLKG_IND_04
